title: Source Media Review
description: Structured review of user-supplied media files. Created before the first planning stage when user media exists. Ensures the agent inspects actual media content instead of planning around assumptions.

files.description: Reviewed source files. Empty when no user media was supplied (or none could be reviewed) — a valid 'fully generated production' state that review_source_media reports explicitly.

reviewed.description: Must be true — the file was actually inspected, not assumed

technical_probe.description: Raw ffprobe or metadata output for this file

content_summary.description: What the file actually contains — described from observation, not assumption

transcript_summary.description: Summary of spoken content, if audio/video with speech

quality_risks.description: Quality issues that affect planning (low resolution, poor audio, shaky footage, etc.)

usable_for.description: What this file can be used for in the production (hero footage, b-roll, background audio, etc.)

summary.description: What the supplied media actually contains and what it does not. Be specific — 'contains 45s of interview footage, no b-roll, mono audio at 44.1kHz' not 'user provided footage'

planning_implications.description: Concrete constraints or opportunities that must affect proposal/script/scene planning. Each item should be actionable.
